title: Switzerland travel to US without Embolo over Esta issue
summary: Switzerland's World Cup squad will travel to the United States without forward Breel Embolo due to his ESTA authorization being under review. The absence deprives the team of an important attacking player ahead of the tournament.
content: Switzerland's World Cup squad travel to the United States without Breel Embolo as the forward's Esta authorisation is placed under review.

zh.title: 瑞士因签证问题缺少恩博洛赴美参加世界杯
zh.summary: 由于布雷尔·恩博洛的ESTA授权正在审查中，瑞士世界杯球队将在没有这位前锋的情况下赴美。他的缺席让球队失去了一名重要的进攻球员。

title: Does Southampton Spygate boss Eckert deserve a second chance?
summary: Southampton manager Tonda Eckert's future is in question after he admitted his involvement in the Spygate scandal. The incident raises concerns about whether he deserves another opportunity to lead the club.
content: BBC Sport explores the future of Southampton manager Tonda Eckert after he admitted his role in the Spygate scandal.

zh.title: 南安普顿"窃听门"主帅埃克特是否应该获得第二次机会？

title: The Braintree defender going to World Cup with New Zealand
summary: Braintree Town defender Tommy Smith has earned a place in New Zealand's World Cup squad, describing it as the "crowning glory of his career." The selection marks a significant achievement for the lower-league defender.
content: Braintree Town defender Tommy Smith is looking forward to the "crowning glory of his career" at the World Cup with New Zealand.

zh.title: 布雷因特里后卫随新西兰参加世界杯
zh.summary: 布雷因特里镇后卫汤米·史密斯已入选新西兰世界杯球队，他称这是职业生涯的"最大荣誉"。这一选择对这位低级别联赛的后卫来说是一项重大成就。

title: Khusanov named in Uzbekistan's World Cup squad
summary: Manchester City defender Abdukodir Khusanov has been selected for Uzbekistan's World Cup squad, which is managed by former World Cup winner Fabio Cannavaro. The inclusion strengthens Uzbekistan's defensive options for the tournament.
content: Manchester City defender Abdukodir Khusanov makes Uzbekistan's squad for the World Cup, led by former World Cup winner Fabio Cannavaro.

zh.title: 库萨诺夫入选乌兹别克斯坦世界杯大名单

title: Japan benefit from new World Cup substitution rule
summary: Japan becomes one of the first teams to benefit from the new time-limited substitution rule when they score with opponents Iceland reduced to 10 players during a substitution window. The rule change is already impacting match outcomes.
content: Japan become one of the first beneficiaries of the new time-limited substitution rule as they score while opponents Iceland have just 10 players on the pitch.

zh.title: 日本受益于世界杯新换人规则
zh.summary: 日本成为首批受益于新的限时换人规则的球队之一，当对手冰岛在换人窗口期间被罚至10人时，日本进球得分。这一规则变化已经在影响比赛结果。

title: Sir Kenny Dalglish undergoing treatment for cancer
summary: Scotland, Liverpool and Celtic legend Sir Kenny Dalglish has publicly confirmed he is undergoing cancer treatment. The announcement affects one of football's most revered figures.
content: Scotland, Liverpool and Celtic great Sir Kenny Dalglish confirms he is undergoing treatment for cancer.

title: Alaba passed fit but Baumgartner out of World Cup
summary: Austria captain David Alaba has been cleared to participate in the World Cup after recovering from a muscle injury, but midfielder Christoph Baumgartner has been ruled out of the tournament. The dual outcome reshapes Austria's midfield options.
content: Austria captain David Alaba is given the all-clear to travel for the World Cup after picking up a muscle injury on Monday but midfielder Christoph Baumgartner is ruled out of the tournament.

title: Galbraith 'all good' with injury after Swansea concern

content: Swansea City midfielder Ethan Galbraith say his calf injury is "all good" after being included for Northern Ireland friendlies with Guinea and France.

title: Wars, sanctions and punishments: Iraq's 40-year World Cup wait
summary: Iraq is returning to the World Cup after a 40-year absence, aiming to deliver stronger performances than their previous appearance in 1986. The nation's comeback represents a significant milestone after decades marked by conflicts and international sanctions.

title: Partey named in Ghana squad for World Cup

summary: The BBC is preparing comprehensive coverage for the 2026 World Cup, which begins June 11 and will be the largest tournament in history. The broadcaster is offering more viewing options and ways to follow the competition than ever before.
content: The biggest World Cup in history starts on 11 June and there are more ways to follow it on the BBC than ever before.

content: England head coach Thomas Tuchel fields questions from under-11 players before his team head to the World Cup.

zh.title: 图赫尔为11岁以下球队成员答疑

title: Humble, powerful, ready - Semenyo returns to where World Cup rise began
summary: Manchester City's Antoine Semenyo returns to Newport for a Ghana friendly before the World Cup, reconnecting with the town where his rise to prominence began. The match provides Wales with an opportunity to test themselves against their World Cup opponents.
content: Before heading to the World Cup with Ghana, a friendly against Wales brings Manchester City's Antoine Semenyo back to Newport where he first caught the eye.

zh.title: 谦逊、强大、准备就绪——塞门约回到世界杯崛起之地
zh.summary: 曼城球员安托万·塞门约在世界杯前返回纽波特参加加纳友谊赛，重新连接起他成名的城镇。这场比赛为威尔士提供了与世界杯对手进行测试的机会。

title: How Cornish miners brought football to Mexico
summary: As Mexico prepares to host the World Cup for a third time, BBC Sport explores the historical link between Cornish miners and the origins of football in Mexico. The story highlights the sport's global connections and Mexico's deep footballing heritage.
content: As Mexico prepares to become the first country to host or co-host the World Cup three times, BBC Sport looks at its Cornish footballing roots.

zh.title: 康沃尔矿工如何将足球带到墨西哥
zh.summary: 当墨西哥准备第三次主办世界杯时，BBC体育探讨了康沃尔矿工与墨西哥足球起源之间的历史渊源。这个故事突出了这项运动的全球联系和墨西哥深厚的足球传统。

title: Wales' Cain leaves Leicester after WSL relegation
summary: Wales forward Hannah Cain is departing Leicester City following the club's relegation from the WSL, while teammate Olivia Clarke will continue with the team. The move reflects the changes within the club following their drop from the top division.
content: Wales forward Hannah Cain is leaving Leicester City following the club's relegation from the WSL but international team-mate Olivia Clarke will stay.

zh.title: 威尔士球员凯恩在WSL降级后离开莱斯特城
zh.summary: 威尔士前锋汉娜·凯恩在俱乐部从WSL降级后离开莱斯特城，而队友奥利维亚·克拉克将继续留在球队。这一举动反映了俱乐部在跌出顶级联赛后发生的变化。
